title: Top B.A (Hons.) Psychology Colleges in Noida & Delhi NCR
content: The study of human behavior is of paramount importance in understanding how a human being behaves in a given situation, under the influence of varying external and internal factors. Applied Psychology has a varied and rich curriculum. Students are required to finish courses that investigate psychology from a philosophical and cultural standpoint, improve critical thinking skills, and aid in the development of a strong understanding of modern psychology subjects. The course aims to instill confidence, knowledge, and capability in both research and practical application as a result of the combination of courses given. This course examines how psychology is applied to work and in the community, and how psychological interventions might help real world problems. Applied Psychology has evolved to be one of the most important branch of Social Sciences in recent times, particularly when it comes to the prediction of individual human behavior. Students in the program receive extensive research training, as they will do qualitative and quantitative research throughout their degree and complete an independent research project in their final year. The bachelor's program in Applied Psychology provides practical exposure in terms of research and field practice. The weightage of these courses is more than 36%. XII with minimum 50% marks in aggregate. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.A (Hons) Psychology Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) 50% or above at XII level in Best Four relevant subjects 01 Graduates will be able to complete a successful higher education, be an effective member of civil society. 02 Graduates will be effectively and meaningfully engaged in helping the mankind by counseling, guidance and develop quality projects in different areas of psychology in India and abroad. 03 Post Graduates will be able to complete a successful higher education, with a specialization in respective field clinical or Industrial psychology, be an effective member of civil society 01 Build capacity to explore the wide array of dimension of human experience. 02 Capable of accepting the challenges of individual and group life using psychological factors. 03 Understand significance and meaning of everyday experience. 04 Use methodologies that celebrate richness and multidimensionality of human behaviour. 05 Enhance the ability to qualitative/ quantitative measure and interpret the data. 06 Empower the students in dealing with issues and problems of self and others. 07 Create a generality of developmental social and other fields and be able to solve issues of self and others. 08 Enable students for critical thinking. 09 Apprise with methodological intricacies in research and application. 10 Develop open-minded and clear approach toward life, career and diversity. 01 Graduates will be able to analyze and optimize psychological concepts for design and development in various fields of Psychology. 02 Graduates will be effectively engaged in helping the man-kind by counseling, guidance and develop quality projects in different areas of psychology in India and abroad. 03 Graduates will generate a culture of continuous self-improvement to achieve personal enrichment and professional ethics. 01 To enable the students for active engagement of Psychological practices and relate to practices of the professionals. 02 To impart training to the students about dynamic social situations, using psychological theories and their practices. XII with minimum 50% marks in aggregate.
